scripts.test:smoke: node -e "const assert=require('node:assert/strict'); const base=process.env.TEST_BASE_URL||'http://127.0.0.1:3000'; const expectStatus=async(path,status)=>{ const res=await fetch(base+path,{redirect:'manual',headers:{'cache-control':'no-cache'}}); assert.equal(res.status,status,`${path} returned ${res.status} instead of ${status}`); return res; }; (async()=>{ const home=await expectStatus('/',200); const homeHtml=await home.text(); assert.equal(homeHtml.includes('Luxe Moon'),true,'home page did not render expected brand text'); await expectStatus('/shop',200); await expectStatus('/about',200); await expectStatus('/api/settings',200); await expectStatus('/api/products',200); await expectStatus('/api/categories',200); const badContact=await fetch(base+'/api/contact',{method:'POST',headers:{'content-type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({})}); assert.equal(badContact.status,400,`/api/contact returned ${badContact.status} instead of 400`); const badOrder=await fetch(base+'/api/orders',{method:'POST',headers:{'content-type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({})}); assert.equal(badOrder.status,400,`/api/orders returned ${badOrder.status} instead of 400`); console.log(`smoke integration checks passed against ${base}`); })().catch(err=>{ console.error(err); process.exit(1); });"
